title: Luxyle Luxury Interior Décor Store – Full Website Build

requirements.text: Build a luxury, minimal, premium-themed single-page React application for 'Luxyle' interior décor store. Apply a consistent color palette of beige (#F5F0E8), ivory (#FFFFF0), white (#FFFFFF), gold accents (#C9A84C), and royal blue (#1B3A6B) for headings/text. Use elegant serif fonts (Cormorant Garamond for headings, Jost for body) with smooth scroll behavior throughout. The overall aesthetic must feel high-end, spacious, and refined.

quotes: Color palette: beige, ivory, white, gold accents, royal blue for text

acceptanceCriteria: Color tokens for beige, ivory, white, gold, and royal blue are applied consistently across all sections
Cormorant Garamond is used for all headings and Jost for body text
Page scrolls smoothly when navigating between sections
No blue/purple accents appear outside the royal blue specification

requirements.text: Implement the Home Page hero section displaying: the store name 'Luxyle', the tagline 'Elevating Spaces with Timeless Luxury', a 'Book Appointment' CTA button that scrolls to the appointment booking section, and a 'Get Directions' button that opens https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Aditya+Cosmopolitan,+Nemawar+Rd,+near+Lakhani+Factory,+Indore,+Madhya+Pradesh+452001 in a new tab. The hero must be visually dominant with a full-width banner using the generated hero background image.

quotes: Hero banner with store name and tagline

acceptanceCriteria: Hero section displays 'Luxyle' and 'Elevating Spaces with Timeless Luxury' prominently
'Book Appointment' button smoothly scrolls to the appointment booking form
'Get Directions' button opens the provided Google Maps URL in a new tab
Hero banner uses the generated background image and fills the full viewport width

requirements.text: Add a Featured Collections preview on the Home Page below the hero, showing a curated subset (4 images) from the collection gallery as a teaser with a 'View Full Collection' link that scrolls to the full collection section.
acceptanceCriteria: 4 collection images are displayed in a premium grid below the hero
'View Full Collection' link is present and scrolls to the full gallery section

requirements.text: Implement the About Us section with the exact brand story: 'At Luxyle, we curate refined interior décor pieces that transform ordinary spaces into luxurious experiences. Every element is selected with attention to detail, elegance, and timeless design.' Style it with an elegant layout including a decorative gold divider and the generated about-image on one side.

quotes: At Luxyle, we curate refined interior décor pieces that transform ordinary spaces into luxurious experiences. Every element is selected with attention to detail, elegance, and timeless design.

acceptanceCriteria: The exact brand story text is displayed verbatim
Section has a gold decorative accent or divider
Layout is split between text and the about image

requirements.text: Build the Collection Section as a full gallery displaying all 8 images in a premium responsive grid layout with hover zoom/overlay effects. Images to use (in order): https://img.sanishtech.com/u/f56125b1f2f52137b6f021abfd8fe562.jpeg, https://img.sanishtech.com/u/d63b3f1566e29fe235b38438a157903f.jpeg, https://img.sanishtech.com/u/d4418e844613722b5c6a9ca37c49d9c4.jpeg, https://img.sanishtech.com/u/d7fe9528299bda266cc2b0f3ee5d5a32.jpeg, https://img.sanishtech.com/u/81f1aea60fd6fe9d51a12ba384647dd8.jpeg, https://img.sanishtech.com/u/dfcd47f133fa1694f66376e81a3788ba.jpeg, https://img.sanishtech.com/u/1803ea59e75d2d8b3b1baba29b3a51f5.jpeg, https://img.sanishtech.com/u/c240a10f7b62e426cd381343d3d3686b.jpeg. Clicking an image should open a lightbox/fullscreen view.

quotes: Create a gallery collection using the following images
Display them in a premium grid layout with hover effects

acceptanceCriteria: All 8 external image URLs are loaded and displayed in a grid
Hovering over an image triggers a smooth zoom or gold overlay effect
Clicking an image opens a lightbox with navigation between images
Grid is responsive across mobile, tablet, and desktop

requirements.text: Display a hardcoded Existing Feedback section showing exactly these three 5-star reviews: (1) 'Luxyle completely transformed my living space. The décor is elegant and premium.' – Priya S. (2) 'Exceptional quality and beautiful collection. Highly recommended!' – Rahul M. (3) 'Perfect place for luxury home décor in Indore.' – Neha K. Each review must show 5 gold stars and the reviewer name.
acceptanceCriteria: All three reviews appear verbatim with correct attribution
Each review displays 5 gold star icons
Hardcoded reviews are always visible regardless of backend state

requirements.text: Implement the customer feedback submission feature: a form with Name, Star Rating (1–5 selector), and Review text fields. Submitted feedback is stored in the backend with a 'pending' status. Pending feedback must not appear publicly until an admin approves it. Once approved, it appears in the feedback section alongside the hardcoded reviews.

quotes: Customers can submit feedback (Name + Rating + Review)
Approved feedback automatically appears in the website feedback section

acceptanceCriteria: Feedback form accepts Name, Rating (1–5 stars), and Review text
Submitted feedback is saved to the backend with a 'pending' status
Pending feedback does not appear in the public reviews section
Approved feedback appears in the reviews section dynamically

requirements.text: Implement the Appointment Booking System: a form where customers select a date (with blocked dates disabled), select a time slot, and fill in Name, Phone, Email, and Message. On submission, the appointment is stored in the backend. The system must also store appointment details so the admin can view them. Admin can approve, reject, or mark specific dates as blocked. Blocked dates must be disabled/unavailable in the customer-facing date picker.

quotes: Fill in Name, Phone, Email, Message
Admin can approve, reject, or block dates

acceptanceCriteria: Date picker disables all admin-blocked dates
Time slot selector is shown after a date is chosen
Form requires Name, Phone, Email, Message fields
Submitted appointments are stored and visible in the admin dashboard
Admin can change appointment status to approved, rejected, or blocked

requirements.text: Build the Contact Page with: (1) Full store address 'Aditya Cosmopolitan, Nemawar Rd, near Lakhani Factory, Indore, Madhya Pradesh 452001', (2) An embedded Google Map iframe for the store location, (3) A contact form with Name, Email, and Message fields, (4) Instagram link to https://www.instagram.com/luxyleofficial?igsh=MTA3aTJqNzJtY2Z2ZQ==, (5) Business hours display (e.g., Mon–Sat: 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM, Sun: Closed).
acceptanceCriteria: Full address is displayed on the contact page
A Google Maps embed is visible showing the store location
Contact form has Name, Email, and Message fields with a submit button
Instagram link is present and opens the correct profile
Business hours are clearly displayed

requirements.text: Implement the site Header with: the 'Luxyle' logo/wordmark, desktop navigation links (Home, Collection, About, Contact), an Instagram icon linking to https://www.instagram.com/luxyleofficial?igsh=MTA3aTJqNzJtY2Z2ZQ== in a new tab, a 'Book Appointment' CTA button, and a collapsible hamburger menu for mobile. The header must be sticky/fixed at the top.

quotes: Instagram Link (Add icon in header & footer)

acceptanceCriteria: Header is sticky and remains visible on scroll
Instagram icon in header links to the correct URL and opens in a new tab
Mobile hamburger menu collapses and expands navigation links
'Book Appointment' CTA button is visible in the header

requirements.text: Implement the site Footer with: the Luxyle brand name/logo, quick navigation links, a services list, full store address 'Aditya Cosmopolitan, Nemawar Rd, near Lakhani Factory, Indore, Madhya Pradesh 452001', an Instagram icon linking to https://www.instagram.com/luxyleofficial?igsh=MTA3aTJqNzJtY2Z2ZQ==, a 'Get Directions' button opening https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Aditya+Cosmopolitan,+Nemawar+Rd,+near+Lakhani+Factory,+Indore,+Madhya+Pradesh+452001 in a new tab, and copyright text '© 2026 Luxyle. All Rights Reserved.'
acceptanceCriteria: Footer displays the store address verbatim
Instagram icon in footer links to the correct profile URL
'Get Directions' button opens the correct Google Maps link in a new tab
Copyright text reads '© 2026 Luxyle. All Rights Reserved.'

requirements.text: Implement the Admin Dashboard (protected by username/password login) with two tabs: (1) Feedback Management: view pending feedback submissions, approve or reject each; (2) Appointments Management: view all submitted appointments with customer details, update status to approved or rejected, and manage blocked dates by adding/removing specific dates from a blocked list.

quotes: Admin can approve, reject, or block dates

acceptanceCriteria: Admin dashboard is accessible only after successful admin login
Feedback tab lists all pending submissions with approve/reject actions
Appointments tab lists all submitted appointments with status controls
Blocked dates can be added and removed from the admin interface
Status changes persist in the backend

requirements.text: Render the generated hero background image (luxyle-hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png) as a static asset in the hero section of the Home Page, and the about section image (luxyle-about.dim_800x600.png) in the About Us section. Both images must be served from frontend/public/assets/generated.

quotes: Hero banner with store name and tagline

acceptanceCriteria: Hero section background uses /assets/generated/luxyle-hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png
About Us section displays /assets/generated/luxyle-about.dim_800x600.png

constraints: All user-facing text must be in English

The Google Maps Get Directions URL must be used exactly as provided: https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Aditya+Cosmopolitan,+Nemawar+Rd,+near+Lakhani+Factory,+Indore,+Madhya+Pradesh+452001
The Instagram URL must be used exactly as provided: https://www.instagram.com/luxyleofficial?igsh=MTA3aTJqNzJtY2Z2ZQ==

Appointment forwarding email reference sharanya.242628@gmail.com must be stored in the backend for display in admin notifications (note: actual email sending is not supported by the platform; appointment data is stored for admin review instead)
Do not edit files in frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Automated email sending to sharanya.242628@gmail.com (platform does not support SMTP/email services; appointment data is stored in backend for admin review)
Internet Identity / blockchain authentication for customers

required: Luxurious interior décor store hero banner — warm beige and ivory tones, soft golden lighting, elegant furniture silhouettes, opulent ambiance, wide cinematic composition (luxyle-hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
Elegant luxury interior showroom scene — rich textures, gold accents, curated décor pieces on display, warm atmospheric lighting, portrait orientation (luxyle-about.dim_800x600.png)
